title: chamaemelum mixtum var. glabrescens
intro: Chamaemelum mixtum var. glabrescens, also known as chamomile, is a daisy-like flowering plant with a long history of medicinal and culinary use. The plant contains flavonoids, terpenoids, and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and soothing properties, making it useful for a variety of health issues. The health benefits of chamomile include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia, digestive issues, and menstrual cramps. Chamomile can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, and is also used in skincare products and as a natural remedy for soothing skin irritations and wounds.
